zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Aucher I於1539年出生在英國英格蘭肯特奧特爾登時，他的父親Sir Anthony Aucher39歲，母親Affra Cornwallis28歲。他於1560年7月14日與Mabel Wroth在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 彼得 可恩爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1568年2月14日在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯布恩享年29歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Aucher I于1539年出生在英国英格兰肯特奧特爾登时，他的父亲Sir Anthony Aucher39岁，母亲Affra Cornwallis28岁。他于1560年7月14日与Mabel Wroth在英国英格兰倫敦聖 彼得 可恩爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1568年2月14日在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯布恩享年29岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: occupational name for someone who watched cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auch .
Scottish: topographic name from Gaelic uachdar ‘upland, summit’, or a habitational name from a place in Perthshire named with this word.

variants.name: Auch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Hermann, Otto.

South German (mainly Stuttgart): metonymic occupational name for someone who minded cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auchter .

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Aucher I was born in 1539, in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Anthony Aucher, was 39 and his mother, Affra Cornwallis, was 28. He married Mabel Wroth on 14 July 1560, in St Peter Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 14 February 1568, in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St Peter Cornhill, London, England: St Peter Cornhill, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Aucher I est né en 1539, à Otterden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Anthony Aucher, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Affra Cornwallis, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mabel Wroth le 14 juillet 1560, à St Peter Cornhill, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 14 février 1568, à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St Peter Cornhill, London, England: St Peter Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Aucher I 1539 in Otterden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Anthony Aucher 39 und seine Mutter Affra Cornwallis 28. Er hat am 14. Juli 1560 in St Peter Cornhill, London, England, United Kingdom Mabel Wroth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1568 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Mabel Wroth il 14 luglio 1560, nel St Peter Cornhill, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 14 febbraio 1568, nel Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Canterbury, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Aucher Iが1539年にイギリスイギリスケントオッテルデンで生まれた時，父Sir Anthony Aucherは39歳，母Affra Cornwallisは28歳であった。1560年7月14日にイギリスイギリスロンドンスト ペター コルンヒルでMabel Wrothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1568年2月14日にイギリスイギリスケントビショプスボウルンで29歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.St Peter Cornhill, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 코른힐
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Aucher I(이)가 1539년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 오터든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Anthony Aucher(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Affra Cornwallis(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1560년 7월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 피터 코른힐에서 Mabel Wroth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1568년 2월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스번에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Aucher I nasceu em 1539, em Otterden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Anthony Aucher, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Affra Cornwallis, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabel Wroth em 14 de julho de 1560, em St Peter Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1568, em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Peter Cornhill, London, England: ст питир корнилл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Aucher I родился в 1539 г. в местности оттирден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Anthony Aucher было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Affra Cornwallis, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabel Wroth 14 июля 1560 г. в местности ст питир корнилл, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 14 февраля 1568 г. в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Mabel Wroth el 14 de julio de 1560, en St Peter Cornhill, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1568, en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
